nasb.text: It is not this way among you, but whoever wishes to become great among you shall be your servant,

esv.text: It shall not be so among you. But whoever would be great among you must be your servant,

cnv.text: 但你們中間卻不要這樣；誰想在你們中間成為大的，就要作你們的僕役；

ccb.text: 你们中间，谁要当首领，谁就要做大家的仆人；

csbs.text: 你们当中却不是这样；相反，谁想在你们当中为大，谁就该做你们的仆人；
